response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and solid software craftsmanship practices, but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++/STL, industrial automation, IEC 62443 SDL, and protocols like MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago, and there is no evidence of industrial cybersecurity, message-broker-based architectures in C++, or IoT protocol work. The skill list does not even include C++.
strengths: 12+ years of professional software engineering with architecture and mentoring experience
Strong testing/TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
concerns: Minimal and dated C++/STL experience — not a core skill in current stack
No evidence of IEC 62443 SDL or industrial cybersecurity practice
No demonstrated work with MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, or industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: Senior-level architecture and mentoring track record
